title: zaluzianskya benthamiana
intro: Zaluzianskya benthamiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is native to the western and central parts of South Africa and is also known as the evening primrose or night-scented stock. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. It is used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, skin conditions, and digestive issues, and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
